scs_clauses_sealed: C22 Restart-and-Input-Latency-by-default (with Windows stdio hard rule)

baseline.top_blocker: orphan-dev-server-reaper.ps1 (duplicate SessionStart registration of a SessionEnd-only script)

iter1.changes: DROP orphan reaper + WRAP auto-compact + WRAP tco_compact_gate
iter1.failure_root_cause: async_wrapper.js used stdio:['pipe',...] which kept the Node event loop open on Windows; child.unref() + process.exit(0) ineffective

iter2.changes: async_wrapper.js stdio:'ignore' for ALL streams + add auto-vault-bootstrap to WRAP_TARGETS

iter3.verdict: OK on 3 of 4 runs; WARN on 1 due to OS background variance
iter3.changes: auto-vault-bootstrap.js wrapped via optimizer COMMIT mode

residuals: Windows AV/disk variance can spike individual hooks 300-700 ms; not fixable from inside the script
Node cold-start floor ~30-150 ms per hook; only addressable by hook-dispatcher consolidation (separate roadmap)
